center.name: 普羅維登西亞島
center.summary: 普羅維登西亞島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Black-whiskered vireo、Mangrove vireo，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-whiskered vireo is found in southern Florida, the Bahamas, the Greater and Lesser Antilles, Providencia and San Andrés islands, the ABC islands, Trinidad and Tobago, and the mainland South American countries of Brazil, Colombia, Guayana, Suriname, and Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: approximans: Isla de Providencia and Isla Santa Catalina off the east coast of Nicaragua The mangrove vireo inhabits different landscapes on the Pacific and Caribbean sides
